items.title: I have friends who made $10M+ and are miserable.
items.title_zh: 我有一些朋友赚了 1000 万美元以上，但他们很痛苦。
items.description: I have friends who made $10M+ and are miserable. I have friends who made that much and found calm - they don’t need to run anymore. I have friends who made far less and are just happy. Whether something is enough is up to you. Whether you’…
items.description_zh: 我有一些朋友赚了 1000 万美元以上，但他们很痛苦。我有一些朋友赚了那么多钱后感到平静——他们不需要再跑步了。我有一些朋友的收入要少得多，但他们很快乐。某件事是否足够取决于你。无论你...

items.title: GBrain is free open source.
items.description: GBrain is free open source. It’s MIT license. You can find it and install it in your agent with one command. https://t.co/yFpFU4pn5b
items.description_zh: GBrain 是免费开源的。这是麻省理工学院的许可证。您可以使用一个命令找到它并将其安装在您的代理中。 https://t.co/yFpFU4pn5b

items.title: What is GBrain?
items.description: What is GBrain? My open source project is a knowledge system, not RAG in a box. It gives agents 8 layers that work together to improve memory in a way that makes your already smart OpenClaw or Hermes Agent feel clairvoyant about who you ar…
items.description_zh: 什么是GBrain？我的开源项目是一个知识系统，而不是盒子里的RAG。它为代理提供了 8 层，这些层协同工作以提高记忆力，使您已经很聪明的 OpenClaw 或 Hermes 代理对您是谁感到有洞察力……
